sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73968" key="*)/omfis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ὄμφις</orth>, said to be <sense id="n73968.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Εὐεργέτης</ref></xr>, title of Osiris, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.368b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
